title: abutilon neelgherrense
intro: Abutilon neelgherrense, also known as Indian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Abutilon neelgherrense include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Abutilon neelgherrense is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, and also used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and ointments.
